## Checklist

- [ ] `cd cli/ac && bun run typecheck` passes with zero errors.
- [ ] `cd cli/ac && bun test` passes with all tests green.
- [ ] Bundle rebuilt (`cd cli/ac && bun run build`) if any file under `cli/ac/` was touched.
- [ ] No em-dash or en-dash anywhere in the changed files (ASCII hyphens only).
- [ ] PR scope covers one concern; unrelated cleanups are in a separate PR.
